conversation.text_en: Hi, I'm your therapist. Everything we discuss here is confidential, so please feel comfortable.
Thanks, I appreciate that.
That's great to hear. So, what's a typical day like for you? Do you have any routines or rituals that help get your morning started?
Yeah, I mean, it's the usual stuff. Got up early, grabbed some coffee, and headed out on my truck. Work was...fine.
That sounds pretty routine. What about social life? Are you doing anything fun or relaxing outside of work?
Um, not really. Honestly, it's been tough to muster up the energy for much of anything lately.
I see. How has your sleep been? Have you noticed any changes in that department?
Sleep is a real challenge right now. I've been waking up multiple times during the night and having trouble getting back to bed.
That can be really frustrating. Have you noticed any changes in your appetite or eating habits too?
Yeah, I've lost my appetite completely. Food just doesn't appeal to me anymore.
Okay. And how about energy levels? Do you feel like you have the get-up-and-go you used to?
Honestly, no. I'm exhausted all the time. Even simple tasks feel overwhelming.
That sounds really tough. Have you tried doing anything that brings you joy or relaxation?
Hobbies-wise, nothing lately. Just feeling stuck and unmotivated, you know?
Yeah, I do. It can be hard to find the motivation when things are feeling so challenging.
Yeah...it's just been one of those weeks, you know? Everything feels like a struggle.
Okay, well, it sounds like you're carrying a lot right now. Can you tell me more about what's been going on at work?
It's just...being a truck driver is getting harder and harder. The company's cutting routes left and right, and I'm feeling overwhelmed trying to make ends meet.
I see. That sounds really stressful. Have you talked to anyone about how you're feeling? Do you have any support system in place?
Not really...I mean, my family's always been supportive, but they're all busy with their own things.
Okay. Well, we can work on building that support system together. Let's see if we can identify some small goals for you to start working towards, okay?
Yeah, that sounds good...I guess.
Great! So, what are some things you've enjoyed doing in the past? Any hobbies or activities that brought you joy?
I used to love playing guitar, but haven't touched it in years...
That's great! Maybe we can explore ways to get you back into playing again. Would that be something you'd like to work towards?
Yeah...that would be nice.
Okay! We'll start there. What do you think is the biggest challenge for you right now?
Just feeling stuck and not knowing how to move forward, I guess.
That makes sense. Well, we can definitely work on that together. Let's keep building from this place, okay?
Yeah...okay.
Great! I want to make sure you're comfortable with the pace of our sessions. Is there anything in particular that's not working for you or feeling overwhelming so far?
No, it's just...I don't know how to fix all this stuff. Feels like too much to handle.
Okay, well, we'll take it one step at a time then! We can work on breaking things down into smaller, manageable pieces. Does that sound doable?
Yeah...I think so.
Great! Well, let's keep going then. What do you hope to get out of our sessions together?
